nl_query: What is the scan completion rate per bundle?
failed_sql:
SELECT b.bundle_code, b.exam_hall, (b.scanned_count::float / b.expected_count::float) * 100 AS scan_completion_rate
FROM bundle b
WHERE b.status = 'SCANNING' AND b.scanned_count < b.expected_count
ORDER BY scan_completion_rate DESC
LIMIT 10;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): bundle.scan_completion_rate. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
